nodes.label: Phase 5 deep-story report (phase5-report.md)
nodes.rationale: First-person research log walking P5.0->P5.9 with figures; states the two verdicts separately (DEPTH-EARNED, READ-CHEAPLY), both continual-safe and natural-confirmed gates cleared; 'SCFF is done, scoped.'

nodes.label: The w12 ceiling — forbidden full-credit diagnostic upper bound
nodes.rationale: A full-credit coordination window reaching across all 12 layers (effectively a full backward pass); never deployed, measured only as the objective-capability upper bound — it composes the whole stack with NO decay, which is the single most important read of the phase: the decay is objective-locality, curable, not an intrinsic Tunnel.
